items.name: AWS Transform now supports model-to-model migration assessment for generative AI workloads
items.summary: AWS Transform now offers a model-to-model migration custom transformation that assesses your generative AI workloads and produces a comprehensive migration plan for moving from third-party providers to Amazon Bedrock.

items.name: Amazon S3 Vectors now supports up to 10,000 similarity search results per query

items.name: AWS Sign-in now supports resource-based policies and resource control policies

items.summary: AWS Partner Central now supports the Business Value Realization (BVR) motion, a new experience and funding motion for partners who drive customer adoption and business outcomes after deploying strategic AWS services.

items.name: AWS Partner Central now validates Foundational Technical Review in minutes

items.name: Amazon S3 Vectors reduces query charges by up to 80% for large vector indexes

items.name: AWS Marketplace reduces listing fee for professional services to 0.5%
